title: The King of Elfland's Daughter
author: Lord Dunsany
description: It’s hard to overstate just how influential The King of Elfland’s Daughter has been to modern fantasy; particularly high fantasy, sword and sorcery, and high fantasy. Lyrical and dream like it takes us on a search for a fairy princess and the magic that man has always secretly craved. Masterfully written, poignant, and yet still full of exciting action and adventure. It’s not simply the beauty of the language, the astute eye for character, the hint of humor, or even the spell of legendry and won...
